requiredRemediation: Add at least one distinct collaborator or organization team that can provide independent governed approvals.
Configure and verify branch protection or a repository ruleset for the protected integration branch.
Configure and verify required status checks and stale-approval dismissal before high-risk closure.
Map governance, CI, quality, security, finance, release, risk, and independent implementation review to real identities or teams without self-approval.
Obtain completed successful GitHub Actions results for the same immutable lian commit used by the closure claim.
